Custom Car Magnets

Full-Color Magnetic Car Signs for Vehicles & Business Promotion

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Quantity Production Time File Upload Design Method Cut Options Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Car Magnets?

Car magnets are flexible magnetic signs made from durable vinyl material with a magnetic backing that adheres to metal vehicle surfaces. These custom promotional products are commonly used for business advertising, personal identification, and temporary vehicle branding that can be easily removed and repositioned as needed. See also [custom holographic vinyl material](https://www.decals.com/custom-holographic-vinyl-material).

Our custom fridge magnet technology extends to automotive applications, creating weather-resistant magnetic signs that maintain their adhesion and vibrant colors through various driving conditions. Car magnets offer a cost-effective alternative to permanent vehicle wraps while providing the flexibility to update messaging or remove signage when desired.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Order Process & Design Methods

Creating custom car magnets involves several design approaches to match your specific promotional needs and technical requirements. Our streamlined ordering system guides you through each step from initial design to final delivery.

Design Methods for Car Magnets

Design from scratch using our intuitive online designer tool, which allows you to upload images, logos, or select from our extensive clipart library to create personalized car magnets. Alternatively, upload your own print-ready file in EPS format to ensure maximum quality reproduction for your custom magnetic signs.

Payment & Order Processing

All car magnet orders require full payment before production begins. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards, plus checks that must clear before manufacturing starts. Once payment is confirmed, your order enters our production queue.

Live Order Tracking for Car Magnets

Every car magnet order receives a unique Live Order Tracking number via email, enabling real-time monitoring through each production stage. This system provides current status updates from order placement through delivery, ensuring complete visibility of your custom magnetic sign progress.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible car magnet production schedules range from one to five business days, allowing you to select the timeline that best matches your promotional deadlines. Production time begins after file upload completion and proof approval, separate from shipping duration.

1 Business Day Priority Car Magnet Production

Fast-track car magnet orders for urgent promotional needs with our priority one-day turnaround option. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day. Emergency same-day service may be available through customer service consultation.

2 Business Days Express Car Magnet Production

Express production provides quick turnaround for car magnets while maintaining quality standards. This option works well for time-sensitive promotional campaigns requiring rapid deployment of custom magnetic vehicle signage.

3 Business Days Standard Car Magnet Production

Our most popular car magnet production timeline offers optimal balance between speed and cost-effectiveness. This standard option accommodates most promotional schedules while ensuring thorough quality control processes.

5 Business Days Saver Car Magnet Production

Cost-saving production option for car magnets when promotional timelines allow extended manufacturing schedules. This economical choice reduces overall project costs while maintaining the same quality standards as faster options.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Cut Options & Finishing

Car magnet finishing options affect both appearance and functionality of your custom magnetic signs. All magnetic signs include protective laminate finishing to ensure durability against weather and vehicle washing conditions.

Die Cut Car Magnets

Custom-shaped car magnets cut to match your specific artwork outline, creating unique promotional pieces that stand out from standard rectangular formats. Die cutting allows complex shapes and eliminates excess material around your design elements.

Square Cut with Rounded Corners Car Magnets

Standard finishing option for car magnets featuring clean rectangular shapes with softened corner edges. Rounded corners reduce wear and prevent corner lifting while maintaining professional appearance for business promotional applications.

Square Cut Car Magnets

Traditional rectangular car magnet format with sharp corner edges, providing maximum magnetic surface area for strong vehicle adhesion. Square cutting works well for text-heavy designs and corporate branding requiring formal presentation.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal car magnet print quality and accurate color reproduction. Our specifications accommodate various file formats while maintaining professional standards for custom magnetic vehicle signage.

Preferred File Types for Car Magnets

Adobe Illustrator EPS and PDF formats provide best results for car magnet printing, supporting vector graphics that scale without quality loss. Maximum file size acceptance is 100 MB. Convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution during production.

Additional File Formats for Car Magnets

High-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files are acceptable for car magnet artwork when vector formats are unavailable. These raster images require specific resolution standards: 100% scale at 100 DPI, 50% scale at 200+ DPI, or 25% scale at 300+ DPI minimum.

Car Magnet File Setup Guidelines

Size artwork proportionate to your exact car magnet dimensions and convert all text elements to outlines. Allow minimal bleed since magnetic signs typically don't require bleed allowances. Indicate cut lines clearly for die-cut car magnet options.

Design Services for Car Magnets

Professional vectorizing and recreation services are available for car magnet artwork starting at $15, with complex designs subject to custom quoting. This service creates high-quality vector files from low-resolution images, ensuring crisp reproduction for your custom magnetic signs.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Shipping Options

Car magnet delivery timelines combine production time with shipping duration to determine total project completion. Our shipping network accommodates various delivery requirements for custom magnetic vehicle signage projects.

Car Magnet Shipping Methods

Ground shipping provides economical delivery for car magnets with 2-8 business day transit times depending on destination distance. Express shipping options reduce delivery time for urgent promotional campaigns requiring faster deployment.

Car Magnet Shipping Time Expectations

Total delivery time includes both production and shipping durations. Ground shipping typically adds 2-5 business days to production time, while express shipping reduces transit time to 1-2 business days for priority car magnet orders.

Important Car Magnet Shipping Notes

Economy shipping options may experience extended transit times during peak seasons or weather delays. International car magnet orders require additional processing time and may be subject to customs delays beyond our control.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Installation & Application

Proper car magnet installation ensures maximum adhesion strength and prevents damage to both the magnetic sign and vehicle surface. Following correct application procedures extends the life of your custom magnetic vehicle signage.

Preparing Vehicle Surfaces for Car Magnets

Clean the vehicle surface thoroughly with soap and water, removing all dirt, wax, and debris that could interfere with magnetic adhesion. Dry the surface completely before applying car magnets to ensure optimal bonding between the magnetic backing and metal surface.

Applying Car Magnets to Vehicles

Position the car magnet on the desired location and smooth from center outward to eliminate air bubbles and ensure complete surface contact. Check that all edges lie flat against the vehicle surface to prevent wind lifting during driving.

Car Magnet Maintenance & Removal

Remove car magnets regularly for cleaning both the magnetic surface and vehicle area underneath. This prevents dirt accumulation and potential surface staining. Store custom holographic vinyl material and magnetic signs flat when not in use to maintain proper shape and magnetic strength.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design Your Custom Car Magnets Today

Transform your vehicle into a mobile advertising platform with professional custom car magnets designed for maximum visual impact and promotional effectiveness. Our comprehensive customization options accommodate business branding, personal identification, and specialty promotional campaigns requiring flexible magnetic signage solutions.

Choose from multiple production timelines, cutting options, and design services to create car magnets that perfectly match your promotional objectives. Whether you need single magnets for personal use or large quantities for fleet applications, our streamlined ordering process delivers professional results with complete order tracking transparency.

Start designing your custom car magnets using our online designer tool, or upload your print-ready artwork for professional reproduction. With fast turnaround times, competitive pricing, and quality materials designed for automotive applications, we provide the magnetic signage solutions your promotional campaigns demand.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet FAQs

What materials are car magnets made from?

Car magnets are made from flexible magnetic vinyl material with a strong magnetic backing and protective laminate coating. This construction provides weather resistance and maintains adhesion to metal vehicle surfaces through various driving conditions.

What vehicle surfaces do car magnets stick to?

Car magnets adhere to ferrous metal surfaces including steel car doors, truck panels, and other magnetic-receptive vehicle areas. They will not stick to aluminum, fiberglass, plastic, or non-metal vehicle surfaces.

Can car magnets go through car washes?

Remove car magnets before entering automatic car washes to prevent damage from high-pressure water and brushes. Hand washing with car magnets in place is acceptable when using gentle pressure and avoiding direct spray on magnet edges.

How long do car magnets last on vehicles?

Quality car magnets maintain adhesion and appearance for 2-3 years with proper care and regular cleaning. UV-resistant inks and laminate protection help prevent fading and weather damage during extended outdoor use.

What sizes are available for custom car magnets?

Car magnet sizes range from small identification magnets to large door panel coverage, with custom sizing available to match specific promotional requirements. Popular sizes include 12"x18", 12"x24", and 18"x24" for standard vehicle applications.

Can car magnets damage vehicle paint?

Properly maintained car magnets will not damage vehicle paint when removed regularly for cleaning. Leaving magnets in one position for extended periods without cleaning may cause temporary impressions that typically disappear with normal vehicle washing.
